svg.text: DRIVER TRIPTYCH
FIG. 04
Driver Triptych for Risk Formation
Ecology pull, access pressure, and delay penalty are separated as three linked map studies
Ecology pull
Water dependence and biological concentration dominate the center-east band.
Access pressure
Road-linked opportunity thickens the same corridor from the south and east.
Delay penalty
Travel lag is most severe in the eastern pocket where interception is slower.
Weight structure in the composite score
Ecology 0.48
Access 0.30
Delay 0.22
Why these three maps are paired
The hotspot is not attributed to one cause only.
The corridor persists because all three forces point to the same cells.
Managerial reading
Cells where all three components align deserve repeated patrols, not one-time sweeps.
This triptych explains the later route and sensor choices.
